title: Reformation
writer: Sidney P. Dones, Leslie T. Peacocke
actors: Sidney P. Dones, Geraldine Steele, Webb King
plot: Carter Spencer, although coming from a religious and socially prominent family, has a wild streak and likes "playing the field", gambling and drinking. He loves Clarice Penlow, a singer in a local choir, who loves him, too, but is...
